title: Up on the 28th ... revisited
content:
Did some experiment with yesterday's photo. The applications have made it all too easy that I think I don't know how to use Photoshop anymore. -"-

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_liuuaazVwF1qzw4y5.jpg)

First the original photo, taken in sequence with iPhone's Camera.app. Then stitched together and cropped with [AutoStitch](http://cvlab.epfl.ch/~brown/autostitch/autostitch.html).

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_liuubvytVl1qzw4y5.jpg)

Applied [Flare](http://flareapp.com/)'s **Mr. Blue Sky** preset (removed the border for comparison purpose). The photo immediately looks better but still a bit too dull.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_liuuf48sXK1qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_liuufoQRvG1qzw4y5.jpg)

The last two photos was edited with [Camera+](http://campl.us). I only applied **Clarity** filter to the top one which gave the photo the HDR-ish look. And added **'70** effect to the second.

I don't think I really need Photoshop anymore. :P

(Every effects and filters were applied with their default setting, except for Mr. Blue Sky border removal.)
